name: Tangy Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs.
2. Add oats, milk, onion, salt, pepper, and garlic powder to the beaten eggs. Mix well.
3. Gradually add the ground beef, mixing until combined.
4. Shape the mixture into 1 1/2-inch balls.
5. Place the meatballs in two 13x9x2-inch baking pans.
6. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 30 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and drain excess fat if needed.
8. Place all of the meatballs in one of the pans.
9. In a saucepan, combine all sauce ingredients and bring to a boil.
10. Pour the sauce over the meatballs.
11. Return to the oven and bake uncovered for 20 minutes or until the meatballs are cooked through.
Yields: 4 dozen From: Taste of Home Magazine Posted by: Debbie Carlson (D.CARLSON - GEnie)
